subject: WM-0134 review: changes_requested
body: Medium: packages/ui-react/src/shell-hud.test.ts imports apps/web/src/product-gate-fixture through a relative cross-workspace path, creating a reversed internal dependency from @wuming-town/ui-react to @wuming-town/web and violating AGENTS/ADR-0001 package-boundary contracts. Other reviewed localization behavior and gates pass; corepack pnpm test --filter web-shell remains a documented repo-script mismatch.
